name: Apple Dump Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the apple pie filling in a 9x13-inch pan.
2. Sprinkle the brown sugar over the apples.
3. Sprinkle the cake mix and chopped pecans evenly over the apple layer.
4. Cut the margarine or butter into thin slices and spread them over the top of the mixture.
5. Ensure the cake is completely covered with the remaining cake mix, pecans, and butter layers.
6. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes to 1 hour until golden brown.
